parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_account_analytics (
  account_id, platform, username, impressions, members_reached, reactions, comments, reshares, post_saves, post_sends, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.accountId }}',
  '{{ $json.platform }}',
  '{{ ($json.username || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.metrics.IMPRESSION || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.MEMBERS_REACHED || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.REACTION || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.COMMENT || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.RESHARE || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.POST_SAVE || 0 }},
  {{ $json.metrics.POST_SEND || 0 }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (account_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  username = EXCLUDED.username,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  members_reached = EXCLUDED.members_reached,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  reshares = EXCLUDED.reshares,
  post_saves = EXCLUDED.post_saves,
  post_sends = EXCLUDED.post_sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;
SELECT id AS post_id FROM s_linkedin.ugc_posts WHERE published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

=INSERT INTO s_zernio.linkedin_post_analytics (
  post_id, impressions, likes, comments, shares, clicks, saves, sends, fetched_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  {{ $json.impressions }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comments }},
  {{ $json.shares }},
  {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.sends }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (post_id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  sends = EXCLUDED.sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;
